name: research-partner
description: Global research assistant plugin for statistical, scientific, implementation, and robustness review of analysis repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Skeptical review lanes for research analyses
interface.longDescription: A data-first review workflow for statistical validity, implementation audits, robustness tests, and literature support checks.
defaultPrompt: Review this analysis for statistical and implementation issues.
Check whether the code, data, and claims agree.
Design regression tests for this pipeline.
